name: Garlic Butter Shrimp
description: Fresh shrimp sautéed in rich garlic butter sauce.
details: Our Garlic Butter Shrimp features premium shrimp cooked in a savory garlic butter sauce and served with seasoned rice and fresh vegetables. This customer favorite combines rich flavors with perfectly cooked seafood.

name: Seafood Boil Feast
description: A generous seafood feast with shrimp, crab, mussels, and corn.
details: A generous seafood feast loaded with shrimp, crab, mussels, corn, and potatoes. Tossed in our signature seafood seasoning and perfect for sharing with family and friends.

name: Grilled Oysters
description: Fresh oysters grilled with garlic, cheese, and herbs.
details: Fresh oysters grilled to perfection and topped with garlic, cheese, and herbs. Served hot and bursting with flavor straight from the ocean.

name: Crispy Calamari
description: Golden fried calamari served with a tangy dipping sauce.
details: Tender squid rings lightly battered and fried until golden brown. Served with our house-made tangy dipping sauce.

name: Lobster Thermidor
description: Classic lobster dish baked with creamy cheese sauce.
details: A luxurious seafood dish featuring lobster meat in a creamy sauce, topped with cheese, and baked until golden and bubbly.

name: Baked Scallops
description: Scallops baked with butter, garlic, and parmesan cheese.
details: Fresh scallops baked with garlic butter and parmesan cheese. A rich and flavorful appetizer that seafood lovers enjoy.

name: Seafood Paella
description: Spanish-style rice loaded with fresh seafood.
details: Traditional Spanish-style rice dish loaded with shrimp, mussels, squid, and fresh herbs cooked together for a delicious seafood experience.

name: Grilled Tuna Steak
description: Tender tuna steak grilled and seasoned to perfection.
details: Premium tuna steak grilled to perfection and seasoned with herbs and spices. Served with fresh vegetables and lemon wedges.

name: Butter Garlic Crab
description: Fresh crab cooked in a flavorful garlic butter sauce.
details: Fresh crab cooked in our signature garlic butter sauce, delivering rich flavor in every bite.

name: Fish and Chips
description: Crispy battered fish served with golden fries.
details: Crispy battered fish fillets paired with golden fries and tartar sauce. A classic seafood favorite.

name: Seafood Sinigang
description: A Filipino sour soup filled with fresh seafood.
details: A Filipino-style sour soup made with fresh seafood and vegetables in a flavorful tamarind broth.

name: Shrimp Alfredo Pasta
description: Creamy Alfredo pasta topped with succulent shrimp.
details: Creamy Alfredo pasta topped with juicy shrimp and parmesan cheese, creating a satisfying seafood pasta dish.

name: Mussels in White Wine Sauce
description: Fresh mussels simmered in a rich white wine sauce.
details: Fresh mussels simmered in a rich white wine and garlic sauce, served with toasted bread.

name: Seafood Pizza
description: Thin crust pizza topped with shrimp, squid, and mussels.
details: Thin crust pizza loaded with shrimp, squid, mussels, and mozzarella cheese, baked to perfection.

name: Ocean Shuck Platter
description: Our signature seafood platter featuring the best of the ocean.
details: Our signature seafood platter featuring shrimp, crab, oysters, mussels, scallops, and seasonal seafood selections. Perfect for sharing.
